nasb.text: Then He touched their eyes, saying, “It shall be done to you according to your faith.”

esv.text: Then he touched their eyes, saying, “According to your faith be it done to you.”

cnv.text: 於是耶穌摸他們的眼睛，說：“照你們的信心給你們成就吧。”

ccb.text: 于是，耶稣摸他们的眼睛，并说：“照你们的信心成全你们吧。”

csbs.text: 于是耶稣摸他们的眼睛，说：“照着你们所信的，给你们成全吧。”
